title: Emergent Ventures grant
leverageNote: Rolling, no deadline, open to age 13+ of any nationality for zero-to-one projects — the single best-fit evergreen grant for a 17-year-old Colombian builder.
notes: Apply anytime. No age floor. Emphasize the ambitious Nella/AI story. Top evergreen pick.

title: Z Fellows
leverageNote: Rolling 1-week program with $10k and an elite founder network; no age floor and solo founders welcome.
notes: Rolling cohorts, apply anytime. Solo OK, no stated age minimum.

title: 1517 Fund — young-founder grants
leverageNote: Micro-grants and pre-seed capital aimed specifically at young technical founders and dropouts — no age barrier.
notes: Rolling. Check the Medici Project grant for the youngest builders.

title: Thiel Fellowship
leverageNote: $200k over two years for young builders; a 17-year-old is age-eligible, but it requires leaving school — a real commitment, so lower priority for now.
notes: Age ≤22 and requires pausing/leaving school. Verify current cycle dates.

title: South Park Commons Founder Fellowship
leverageNote: Pre-idea founder fellowship with capital and a strong technical community; verify eligibility for a 17-year-old pre-company founder.
notes: Verify age eligibility; historically expects some relocation to a hub.

title: Entrepreneur First (EF)
leverageNote: Talent-first investor that backs individuals pre-team/pre-idea with pre-seed capital; strong for a technical solo builder — check nearest hub and age floor.
notes: Cohort-based; often 18+ and requires relocating to a hub — verify before applying.

title: Neo (Scholars / Accelerator)
leverageNote: Elite program and network for young technologists; historically US-university-centric, so verify international/age eligibility.
notes: Check: often targets US CS undergrads. Confirm a Colombian 17-yo qualifies for the current cycle.

title: Y Combinator
leverageNote: The elite accelerator; no age barrier and remote interviews. Batches recur (Winter/Spring/Summer/Fall) — a plan-ahead flagship worth preparing for continuously.
notes: Batches open on a rolling cadence — verify the current batch's deadline. Early application is fine.

title: a16z Speedrun
leverageNote: a16z's accelerator for tech/AI/games founders with large checks; recurring cohorts, remote-friendly.
notes: Verify the next cohort open/close dates and age eligibility.

title: ETHGlobal hackathons
leverageNote: Recurring online + in-person hackathons with big prize pools and bounties — dead-center for an agent/AI builder.
notes: Check the events page for the next online edition (remote is high-leverage, no travel).

title: Microsoft Imagine Cup
leverageNote: Annual global student technology competition, undergrad-eligible and remote — grand prize plus mentorship and Azure credits.
notes: Student competition; registration usually opens in the fall with a ~January deadline. Verify current cycle.

title: Hult Prize
leverageNote: Annual student social-enterprise competition with campus + regional rounds culminating in up to $1M — undergrad-eligible worldwide.
reward: Up to $1M for the winning team
notes: Runs annually; check whether your university hosts an on-campus round or enter a regional wildcard.

title: Major League Hacking (MLH) season
leverageNote: The official student-hackathon league — a browsable season of dozens of events, many remote-friendly and open internationally.
notes: Browse the current season for online events open to international students.

title: Slush 100 pitching competition
leverageNote: Elite annual startup pitch competition with major investor access; in-person Helsinki (~November), so pursue only if the prestige/travel is worth it.
notes: Event ~November; applications historically open ~Aug–Sep. In-person only — weigh travel from Colombia. [estimated timing]

title: Ruta N — Medellín innovation programs
leverageNote: Medellín's flagship innovation hub runs recurring local convocatorias, programs and demo days — attendable in-person locally, which is exactly the high-signal local presence Pablo asked for.
notes: Local, attendable in person = high value. Check the site for the current open convocatoria before applying.

title: Wayra — Telefónica LatAm accelerator
leverageNote: Telefónica's LatAm accelerator with recurring open calls and pilot opportunities across Colombia/Hispam — a strong regional, Spanish-language funding lever.
notes: Recurring open calls; verify the current Colombia/Hispam cohort and age eligibility.
